# PromptScript

> Prompt-as-Code for Enterprise AI. Standardize, audit, and deploy instructions across any AI coding assistant.

PromptScript is an agent platform configuration language. It defines
instructions, skills, agents, MCP servers, plugins, hooks, workflows,
and policies once, then compiles native output for 48 AI coding agent
targets.


## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/getting-started/index.md)
- [Tutorial](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/tutorial/index.md)

## Agent Platform

- [Overview](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/features/index.md): Agent platform concepts and complete feature model
- [Agents](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/features/agents/index.md): Native agents, tools, skills, and MCP access
- [Skills and Resources](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/features/skills/index.md): Portable skills, resources, scripts, and contracts
- [MCP Servers and Plugins](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/features/integrations/index.md): MCP servers and plugin bundles
- [Hooks and Workflows](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/features/automation/index.md): Lifecycle hooks, workflows, and build automation
- [Target Platforms](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/features/target-platforms/index.md): All 48 target platforms and output families

## Reference

- [Language](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/language/index.md): Complete PromptScript language specification
- [Overview](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/cli/index.md): CLI commands and options
- [Hook Management](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/cli/hooks/index.md): AI tool hook installation and removal
- [Hook Runtime](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/cli/hook/index.md): Low-level hook runtime contract
- [Configuration](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/config/index.md): Configuration file format

## Target Platforms

- [Platform Matrix](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/formatters/index.md): All 48 supported AI agent targets
- [Claude Code](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/formatters/claude/index.md): Claude Code output format, skills, agents, local files
- [GitHub Copilot](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/formatters/github/index.md): GitHub Copilot output format, instructions, prompts, skills
- [Cursor](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/formatters/cursor/index.md): Cursor output format, MDC frontmatter, commands
- [Antigravity](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/formatters/antigravity/index.md): Antigravity output format, workflows, activation types
- [Factory AI](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/formatters/factory/index.md): Factory AI output format, droids, skills
- [Gemini CLI](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/formatters/gemini/index.md): Gemini CLI output format, commands, skills
- [OpenCode](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/reference/formatters/opencode/index.md): OpenCode output format, commands, skills, agents

- [Inheritance](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/inheritance/index.md): PromptScript inheritance system
- [Multi-File Organization](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/multi-file/index.md): Multi-file organization
- [Build Your Registry](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/registry/index.md): Building a PromptScript registry
- [Policy Engine](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/policy-engine/index.md): Organization policy enforcement
- [Security](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/security/index.md): Security controls and best practices
- [CI/CD Integration](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/ci/index.md): CI/CD integration
- [Enterprise Setup](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/enterprise/index.md): Enterprise setup

## Migration and Operations

- [Migration](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/migration/index.md): Migration guide
- [AI Tool Hooks](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/hooks/index.md): Automatic source compilation hooks
- [Importing Instructions](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/import/index.md): Import existing agent instructions
- [Formatter Architecture](https://getpromptscript.dev/v1.14/guides/formatter-architecture/index.md): Internal architecture of formatters
